rationale: This is a static IP-driven anime card-battler creative leaning on Dragon Ball Z brand recognition — none of which Push'em All can borrow without trademark risk. The minimalist stickman/physics-push core loop has zero affinity with a charged-energy-blast hero pose, and the neon magenta/yellow palette clashes with the game's clean blue/green/red hypercasual look. Audience overlap is also weak: Dokkan players skew mid-core gacha/RPG, not the broad casual swipe-and-satisfy crowd. Skip — do not adapt this archetype.
